sqlMap.select:
select count(*) from sys_xtjzd_role r left join sys_department_t d on d.id=r.xtjzdid left join sys_department_t pcs on pcs.id=r.pcsid where r.validflag>0
d.departname like '%$xtjzdname$%'
order by xtjzdid

select r.*,d.departname as xtjzdname,pcs.departname as pcsname from sys_xtjzd_role r left join sys_department_t d on d.id=r.xtjzdid left join sys_department_t pcs on pcs.id=r.pcsid where r.validflag>0
d.departname like '%$xtjzdname$%'
order by xtjzdid
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO sys_xtjzd_role (xtjzdid,pcsid) VALUES ($xtjzdid$,$pcsid$) SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID() AS ID
sqlMap.update: UPDATE sys_xtjzd_role SET xtjzdid = $xtjzdid$,pcsid = $pcsid$ WHERE id = $id$
UPDATE sys_xtjzd_role SET validflag = 0 WHERE id = $id$
